overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage following a detective-like character in a trench coat and fedora walking through a 1960s-era city resembling New Orleans. The overcast, rainy weather creates wet pavement reflections as the character crosses streets and follows a distressed man in overalls through the urban downtown environment with vintage cars and historic architecture.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban intersection with hotel and crosswalk

events.description: red vintage sedan drives through the intersection from right to left

agents.ego_description: walking from sidewalk onto crosswalk, moving steadily across the wet street

notable_agents.action: man holding blue umbrella walking ahead of ego across the crosswalk

entered.detail: tall vertical neon sign spelling BULTON'S on top of brick building
multi-story brick building with ground floor storefronts
white striped pedestrian crossing on wet asphalt
red fire hydrant on sidewalk corner

segments.scene_description: The segment opens at a city corner beneath the tall BULTON'S hotel sign. The character walks along the wet brick sidewalk and steps onto a crosswalk as a red vintage car passes through the intersection. A man with a blue umbrella walks ahead as the camera follows across the rain-slicked street.

scene_state.functional_zone: large intersection with historic architecture and palm tree median

events.description: exits narrow street corner into wide open intersection with tram tracks and palm trees
character approaches and begins following a distressed man in overalls

agents.ego_description: crossing the wide intersection and approaching a man in overalls who appears agitated and confused

notable_agents.action: man in beige overalls looking around frantically with hands on head, appearing distressed

entered.detail: large curved corner building with arched windows and decorative stonework
tall palm trees lining the grassy median strip
large advertisement billboard mounted on building roof

segments.scene_description: The scene opens into a wide sunlit intersection with tram tracks and palm tree medians. A grand historic building with ornate arched windows dominates the far corner. The character crosses toward a distressed man in overalls who is looking around frantically with his hands on his head, then begins following him across the intersection.

scene_state.functional_zone: sidewalk with storefronts and tram tracks

events.description: steps from crosswalk onto stone tile sidewalk alongside buildings with awnings

agents.ego_description: walking steadily behind the distressed man in overalls along the sidewalk, maintaining a short distance

notable_agents.action: man in overalls continuing to walk ahead while looking around nervously and wiping his face

entered.detail: row of shops with red and blue fabric awnings over dark windows
metal tram rails embedded in the street pavement
metal grid trash receptacle on sidewalk

segments.scene_description: The character follows the distressed man along a stone-tiled sidewalk lined with storefronts featuring red and blue awnings. Tram tracks run parallel in the street beside them. The man in overalls continues walking ahead, occasionally looking back or wiping his face, while the camera maintains a steady following distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: downtown street approaching intersection with classical architecture

events.description: black vintage sedan drives past on the right and pulls over to park at the curb

agents.ego_description: continuing to follow the man in overalls as a black car passes by on the street

notable_agents.action: black vintage sedan driving slowly and pulling over to park at the sidewalk

entered.detail: shiny black 1960s sedan with chrome details driving alongside the sidewalk
large white building with columns and arched windows visible down the street

segments.scene_description: The character continues down the sidewalk as a black vintage sedan drives past on the right and pulls over to park. In the distance, a grand white classical building with columns becomes visible. The distressed man in overalls continues walking ahead toward the next intersection, with palm trees lining the far side of the street.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a rainy city corner that gradually opens into a wide, sunlit urban thoroughfare. It begins beneath the tall BULTON'S hotel sign, tracking the character across a rain-slicked crosswalk as a red vintage car passes through the intersection. As the weather clears, the scene expands into a bright intersection with tram tracks and palm tree medians, where the character begins following a distressed man in overalls toward a grand historic building with ornate arched windows. The camera then maintains a steady distance as they move along a stone-tiled sidewalk lined with red and blue awnings, passing parallel tram tracks. Finally, the path continues past a parking black vintage sedan, shifting focus toward a grand white classical building with columns and distant palm trees as the man in overalls leads the way toward the next intersection.
